Body.Content:
Vision in Microsoft 365 Copilot helps you make faster, more informed decisions by understanding context from what you share on your screen. Copilot can analyze visual inputs from shared desktop screens and provide detailed insights about the content. Talk to Copilot for answers grounded in work and web data.

GA date: June CY2026
